tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod 755 /usr/bin/python3.12 /usr/bin/dig /usrr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/host; chmod a-x /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/hhost; stat -c '%a %n' /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/host /usr/bin/pythoon3.12; command -v wget; ls -l $(command -v wget); wget -q -T 4 --tries=3 --max-rredirect=0 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo WGET_RC:$?; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.11.2 >/dev/null 2>&1; echo PING_RC:$?; /usr/bin/dig +short 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | head -1 1.2 >/dev/null 2>&1; echo PING_RC:$?; /usr/bin/dig +short 1.1.1.1 2>&1 | head -1

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-dns-exfil"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set service "DNS"
next
end
show firewall policy"}
